events.title: TechSummit 2026
events.location: Moscone Center, 747 Howard Street, San Francisco, CA 94103

events.title: TechSummit 2026 - Registration Confirmed
events.location: Moscone Center, 747 Howard Street, San Francisco, CA 94103
events.description: Full Conference Pass (3-Day) for Alex Chen. Includes registration, breakfast, keynote speeches, sessions, workshops, networking lunch, welcome reception, and closing keynote. Badge pick-up at Registration Desk. Event runs March 18-20, 2026. App available for schedule and networking.

events.title: Registration & Breakfast
events.location: Moscone Center, 747 Howard Street, San Francisco, CA 94103
events.description: Day 1 of TechSummit 2026. Attendees must register and enjoy breakfast before the opening keynote at 9:00 AM.

events.title: Opening Keynote
events.location: Moscone Center, 747 Howard Street, San Francisco, CA 94103
events.description: First session of TechSummit 2026 on Wednesday, March 18, 2026. Scheduled from 9:00 AM to 10:00 AM.

events.title: Sessions (Day 1)
events.location: Moscone Center, 747 Howard Street, San Francisco, CA 94103
events.description: Day 1 sessions run from 10:00 AM to 6:00 PM on Wednesday, March 18, 2026. Multiple tracks available.

events.title: Welcome Reception
events.location: Moscone Center, 747 Howard Street, San Francisco, CA 94103
events.description: Evening social event on Day 1 of TechSummit 2026, held after sessions conclude at 6:00 PM.

events.title: Sessions & Workshops (Day 2)
events.location: Moscone Center, 747 Howard Street, San Francisco, CA 94103
events.description: Day 2 sessions and workshops run from 8:00 AM to 6:00 PM on Thursday, March 19, 2026.

events.title: Networking Lunch
events.location: Moscone Center, 747 Howard Street, San Francisco, CA 94103
events.description: Lunch break scheduled at noon on Thursday, March 19, 2026, for networking during TechSummit 2026.

events.title: Sessions (Day 3)
events.location: Moscone Center, 747 Howard Street, San Francisco, CA 94103
events.description: Final day sessions run from 8:00 AM to 3:00 PM on Friday, March 20, 2026. Conference ends at 4:00 PM.

events.title: Closing Keynote
events.location: Moscone Center, 747 Howard Street, San Francisco, CA 94103
events.description: Closing keynote speech on Friday, March 20, 2026, starting at 3:00 PM and ending at 4:00 PM.

events.title: Conference Ends
events.location: Moscone Center, 747 Howard Street, San Francisco, CA 94103
events.description: Official end of TechSummit 2026 conference at 4:00 PM on Friday, March 20, 2026.
